news.title: Teaching endorsements, certificates, or degrees: Which path is right for you?
news.summary_en: Check out some of the top options for professional development for teachers from UNI if you're interested in advancing your career!

news.title: Accelerated BSN at University of Northern Iowa now enrolling for fall launch
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is now enrolling students for its new Accelerated Bachelor of Science in Nursing (ABSN) program, set to launch in August 2026.

news.title: Meet the spring 2026 graduating class
news.summary_en: Keep reading to meet a few members of spring 2026 graduation class and make sure you tell them “congrats!” if you see them in person!

news.title: Anne Lefter named executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is pleased to welcome Anne Lefter as the new executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center.

news.title: UNI Division of Graduate Studies Hosts Annual Event Celebrating Excellence
news.summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa’s Division of Graduate Studies honored outstanding graduate  students, faculty and staff during the annual graduate faculty meeting, an event recognizing individuals whose leadership, service and achievements have made a significant impact on the UNI graduate education community.
